candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line representing top-line sales.
Finance income, not operating revenue; unsuitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.
Operating expenses but more like overhead; less directly identifiable as COGS than material costs.
Explicit SG&A; overhead not COGS.
Selling expense, part of SG&A not COGS.
Direct cost of materials used in production; best proxy for COGS.
May include both production and overhead payroll; less precise than direct material cost for COGS.
Mixed operating income/expense, not pure COGS.
Financial result, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Overhead/occupancy; part of SG&A, not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
Supplemental rental info, not core COGS.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D-related grants, not COGS.
Inventory component, not period expense COGS.
Liability, not COGS line item.
Operating overhead but more generic; used only if no explicit SG&A line existed.
Explicit SG&A line with populated values; per rules this should be the sole XSGA_COMPONENTS selection.
Mixed income/expense; not a clean SG&A component.
Specific SG&A component, but appears only as supplemental and may be embedded in SG&A line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization component; excluded from SG&A per instruction to exclude D&A from XSGA.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization, not SG&A overhead per rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not the current period R&D expense itself.
Direct line for R&D expense; best match for XRD even if recent columns show nans.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental grants info; not the gross R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, not R&D expense itself.
Capitalized R&D asset, not P&L expense.
Accumulated amortization balance, not current-year expense line.
Aggregated net interest; good fallback if detailed interest expense lines are missing.
Interest on lease liabilities; component of total interest expense, but we prefer broader interest expense line first.
Primary interest expense line (non-lease); best first-choice for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on finance lease liabilities; secondary interest component.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity income allocation, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful if primary lines missing.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance sheet amount.

candidates.row_label: Earnings per share equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Per-share earnings metric, not equity level.

candidates.row_label: Diluted earnings per share equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of AKVA group ASA
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE per rules.
Component of equity, but not the total owner equity; less appropriate than the dedicated total line.
Retained earnings only; not total equity.
Includes non-controlling interests; acceptable only if owner-equity-alone line was absent.
Total assets/liabilities & equity; not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of AKVA group ASA

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity amount; prefer BS lines for MIB.
Same as above; income allocation, not equity level.
Balance sheet minority equity; ideal for MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests; useful as alternate if naming changes.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income metric, not minority equity.
